## Commands

<a id="command-abandon_quest"></a>

### `cmd.abandon_quest(questId)`

Abandons a quest.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/quest.ts:262`

```ts
cmd.abandon_quest(questId: number): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `questId` | `number` | yes |  | Quest id. |

<a id="command-accept_quest"></a>

### `cmd.accept_quest(questId, silent)`

Accepts a quest.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/quest.ts:244`

```ts
cmd.accept_quest(questId: number, silent: boolean = false): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `questId` | `number` | yes |  | Quest id. |
| `silent` | `boolean` | no | `false` | Whether to load the quest without showing the Quest Popup. |

<a id="command-complete_quest"></a>

### `cmd.complete_quest(questId, options)`

Completes a quest.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/quest.ts:287`

```ts
cmd.complete_quest(questId: number, options?: CompleteQuestOptions): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `questId` | `number` | yes |  | Quest id. |
| `options` | [`CompleteQuestOptions`](../quest/#type-completequestoptions) | no |  | Optional reward and turn-in settings. |
| `options.itemId` | `number` | no |  | Reward item id to choose. |
| `options.turnIns` | [`QuestTurnInsArgument`](../quest/#type-questturninsargument) | no |  | Number of turn-ins, or `max` to turn in as many times as possible. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.complete_quest(11)
```

```js
cmd.complete_quest(123, { itemId: 123 })
```

```js
cmd.complete_quest(1234, { itemId: 123, turnIns: "max" })
```
